chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-610 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection For katcha peshi 30-11-2017. Mr. Mumtaz Alam Leghari, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Rajput, Assistant Attorney General of Pakistan Mr. Jangu Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB = Learned counsel for petitioner on instruction does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
